name: CTA Red Line Extension Utility Relocation Tunnel
address: 103rd Street to 130th Street under S. Michigan Ave
description: 2.1-mile dual-bore bored tunnel using Earth Pressure Balance EPB TBM nicknamed Mary after Mary Breckinridge. 21-foot ID finished bore per barrel. Tunnel depth ranges 45-65 feet BGS through Chicago Blue Clay transitioning to Dolomite bedrock at south terminus. Three new underground station caverns at 111th St 119th St and 130th St. Eight cross passages per NFPA 130. Utility relocation package includes ComEd 138kV transmission NICOR 8-inch gas main and CDOT 48-inch water main. All union labor: Laborers Local 2 Operating Engineers Local 150 Ironworkers Local 1 Electricians Local 134. FTA Full Funding Grant Agreement FFGA compliance. DBE 25 percent participation goal.
